title: CakeShake™ at Harris Park — cake inside a milkshake, open till 10pm
summary:
CakeShake™: a full slice of eggless cake inside a milkshake. Harris Park's most talked-about item.

It's not a gimmick. The cake is fresh — baked to order, same flavour range as our custom cakes. 15 options including Rasmalai, Mango, and Ferrero Rocher. The milkshake base is made in-house.

If you're in Parramatta, Westmead, or Granville and you've been looking for something genuinely different for dessert — this is it. We're open until 10pm, seven days. Walk in or order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725.

100% eggless. Always.
keywords: unique dessert near Parramatta open late
